reviews.review_text: The venue had been great but it is struggling to be maintained. Laundry blocks shut down and dryers not working. The pools are great for the kids.

We won't go to any other Caravan Park in Alice Springs.
Clean. All area's.

Such a great park! The facilities are excellent—clean, modern, and very well maintained. It feels safe and secure, and the location is perfect with an easy walk to the Alice Springs Brewery. The staff are incredibly friendly and helpful, the amenities are spotless, and the camp kitchen is really well equipped. The on-site shop is also well stocked with anything you might need.

Great caravan park with excellent amenities. Well maintained and clean, with excellent security.
Staff are always friendly and helpful. Good sized sites too.
Fine for one night on but the communal bathrooms are dirty: mold in the showers, cobwebs everywhere, toilets with stains….

From 10th to 11th May, I stayed at Discovery Parks - Alice Springs with four of my friends in a chalet that can comfortably accommodate up to six people. It is a comfortable, well-laid-out, and handy unit with all the required utensils and facilities for a pleasant stay.
I would like to bring to the attention of the management that the bathroom commode appeared not to have been cleaned properly with the correct brushes or cleaning equipment. It also seemed that the person responsible may not have been properly trained for the task. If required, I would even be happy to provide training free of charge, or assist in supplying proper brushes if they are not available in Alice Springs, as this issue can negatively affect the overall impression of an otherwise good unit.
I hope the management will take this review positively and continue improving their service for future guests.
The front desk staff were very good, helpful, and professional, and all the information materials were neatly displayed.

Myself and my partner had a horrible time. We were accused of leaving the kitchen in a dirty state even when we used every measure ( Tin foil on bbq etc) to keep it clean. We were also told that our dogs were "crapping everywhere" as said by one of the elderly workers even though we had cleaned up our dogs mess everyday. We had seen multiple other guests walking their dog to vacant spots and letting their dog do their business and walking away without cleaning up. There was also open use of illegal drugs in the camp kitchen and this made for an unsafe atmosphere. We were eventually asked to leave as they said they didn't want an explanation and just wanted us out. Terrible would highly recommend you book the other pet friendly option down the road.

Stopped here twice in the last month as needed repairs to the van. Called on the phone numerous times and left messages and could never get through. Lady in reception very rude both times upon arrival. Others we met in the park said the same, clearly customer service isn’t her strong point. . Was overcharged the second time I came back. Grass extremely long and in a desperate need of a mow all throughout. It did not look any different to the 1st time we were there 10 days earlier. One amenities blocked closed. Even though it is quiet they stack you on top of each other. Pool was cold but well maintained.
Felt secure at all times in the park
Great park secure location, clean amenities large sites. Staff were very friendly we stayed 5 nights so much to do and see in Alice Springs will be back next time we are passing

Discovery Parks - Alice Springs is a fantastic campground that we really enjoyed during our stay. We hadn’t booked in advance, but the check-in process was seamless thanks to the really nice lady at reception who got us sorted right away.

The campground itself is quite large and impressively well-equipped with plenty of additional facilities, including a cozy reading room which was a great touch. It’s also an excellent spot for families, as they offer lots of activities for children, such as movie shows held on the sunset hill.

While it is a bit of a walk to reach the bathrooms from the unpowered sites, the overall quality and atmosphere of the park made it a very pleasant stay. We would definitely recommend it to anyone passing through Alice Springs!

Had a great time camping here. Fantastic facilities,the staff were lovely and pancakes on the Sunday made it even better. Loads for kids to do too,we didn’t explore the whole place as didn’t have enough time but the pools alone were enough for us to definitely visit again!
Always a great place to stay

We had a powered site for 2 nights. Not sure what is going on with this park. All very flash and fancy at reception and as you enter park past pools but then you notice park is overgrown with weeds and grass as you get to sites. All lawn areas look like they need mowing and a good water. Some amenities blocks closed as they don’t think there’s enough travellers to warrant opening. Well when you pay top dollar I think you should be able to access all facilities especially when there was a couple of school groups there with lots of teenagers who couldn’t care about anyone else. Amenities were dirty, have not been properly cleaned for some time as lots of mould and dirt on tiles, spider webs everywhere and broken shower heads attached with duct tape ! Do you need more staff ?? We’ve have stayed at this park before and have always thought how well kept it is but not this time.
Great, quiet, secure location in Alice Springs. Good cottages. Lot of camping spaces. Family friendly. Nice amenities like pool, BBQ area.

Cabins were clean and very spacious for my family of 4.
Extra big bathroom and a huge undercover car park with a picnic table as well.

Kids made good use of the pools, which accommodated every age group and the playgrounds as well.

We'll definately be staying again in the future.

Great pools and splash park for the kids. Good security which unfortunately is needed in Alice.
Alice Springs brewing nearby is also excellent.

We are staying in a deluxe 2brm pet friendly cabin. Very pleased with pet friendly options. The facilities in this park are incredible and staff have been welcoming.

The only feedback I have is cabin itself could do with a spring clean, a lot of scuff marks on the walls and dust on the fans.
This is an efficiently run large caravan park with everything you might want and more. We will be returning here. Great job guys

Awesome park.  Very quiet due to current world issues and diesel costs.
Staff are awesome. Everything is so clean and well cared for. Nothing too much to ask from staff if you need anything or assistance or recommendations
Great service, clean, simple cabin. Pet friendly

Got an upgrade in our room.
New cabins are great, plenty of room and good aircon to assist with the heat.

We booked a cabin for an overnight stay with our dogs. The cabin itself is quite dated and only has air conditioning in the main living area. With temperatures over 40° in Alice Springs that day, the bedrooms became very hot. The staff had thoughtfully turned the air conditioning on before our arrival, which we really appreciated. However, if we were a family needing to use the bunks and main bedroom, it would have been quite uncomfortable. Additional air conditioning in the bedrooms would make a big difference.
Booked in for 1 day & stayed for 4 days, fantastic park, plenty for kids to do, very secure park.

Very nice to be upgraded. Although I was offered two different sites, I chose the one with the free upgrade, and a lady said "wow, you're hard to please". That was not great to hear.
But aside from the snarky attitude, there were some friendly faces. All of the enclosed spaces had air conditioning, including games room, tv room, reading room, and a gym. All seperate, and the gym was a nice surprise. The reading room was especially nice, and it was adults only. So great for quiet time. 🙂
Even though it's very hot in summer, the different cool rooms make it almost bearable. Haha.

Nice and Big caravan park to stay.
Lots of options for the kids to play and Swim.
Good food and convenient place.
Will definitely be back again.

Staff are very friendly and accommodating especially when we were having car issues. Cabins are neat and tidy.
Kids loved all the things here for them, especially the water park.

Great safe park 👍🏻
Fantastic pool area
Lots of different sites .. from dirt/ no power
Camps for school kids
Grass/shaded sites P&W for vans etc
To cabins.. amazing setup for all travellers
Amenities great
And activities for the kids
Would stay again when travelling through Alice😊
Amazing family friendly park with lots to do
staff are amazing, went above and beyond to make me feel comfortable and help me, really appreciate it!!

I will become a member for discovery parks based on the Great customer service Linda the receptionist gave me , Linda is a true Gem ( A Diamond ) who deserves recognition for her great work. Linda you are AMAZING thankyou
Easy to access, plenty of activities for families and secure. The team has excellent communication.
Really nice place to stay.

Probably one of the best cleanest caravan parks i have ever stayed at .so kid friendly with an amazing water park and pool. The facilities were superb clean with great WiFi and super helpful staff .great price .i will definitely stay again
Great place, we loved the pool, playground and bouncy pillow. We especially liked the Sunday Pancake breakfast.

Toller, großer und sauberer Campingplatz mit Pool.
Tolle Stellplätze.
Great cortous spokes person.great reasonable price
Overall the experience was great and staff were very helpful and friendly
Un camping parfait, emplacement spacieux et commodités parfaitement propre. Le personnel a été d'une grande gentillesse avec nous et d'un service plus qu'irréprochable.
Exceptional Park experience.

Very well laid out park with very good facilities

great for kids..pool and play area

Dog friendly too

Staff ver helpful

….and over the road for the Alice Springs brewery for good food and beer…also dog friendly

Booked in for a night with plans to head out the following day to seek a free site, but were so impressed that we booked in for the week. Prices are very reasonable, heaps of amenities, helpful staff, safe and quiet location. Yeah, a couple of potholes, but the pools (yes, 4) were clear and clean, unlike another nearby park we stayed at, for nearly triple the price. Alice Springs has lots to see and do, and staying here whilst doing has been a pleasure.
Highly recommend this park

Very well presented and tidy. Many activities for kids offered. Pools and water slide. Water playground for children. Very dog friendly even has dog friendly cabins. Across the road from Alice Springs Brewary for refreshments and food
Best caravan park we stayed at very clean great pools well equipped camp kitchen reasonably priced
Great park plenty of space and great water park. And reasonable rates. 👍😍

What a cracker spot!
Well located in what seems a safer part of town, heaps and I mean heaps of facilities, lost count of the camp kitchens and amenities. Several different pools, a cool water slide, a totally separate water park area also with a water slide, 2 x bouncy pillows, a lovely hill to watch the sunset, activities every evening.
All of the above coupled with great service and second to none response to any issues going on.
Saw people from the park working well into the night to solve a plumbing issue, minutes after it was reported.
Incredible value for what you get!
Highly recommend this place for so many reasons!
Been to a lot of parks around Australia and this would have to be one of the best 👌. Credit to staff and owners.
Comfortable and had all that we needed.

Fabulous place ...secure out of town a lil ways.
Great sunset hill, pools were fabulous with lap pool and waterslides for kids *and big kids haha
Stayed 5-9 Sept
Wouldn't stay anywhere else.
Clean facilities, professional staff. Looked to be very much family focussed. Would definitely book again. And, also, well priced!

We stayed in the deluxe cabins(July & August)which were very modern and have excellent amenities. Under cover parking with table and seating outside.
Bed was very comfortable and large. Bathroom was very large, very modern, very clean. The shower, in particular, was the largest one we've come across in van park cabins.
Full kitchen with fridge like you would have at home.
Table and 4 chairs inside, plus a lounge. The TV was a reasonable size and work well.
There are 3 steps to get from outside to in. The screen door can be pinned to keep open for easy access.
The Park has a variety of planned activities on any given day. A list is at each main camp kitchen.
There are multiple pools. Some heated, some not, so take your pick.
A bouncy castle, activity room and activity shed( for line dancing evenings, etc.)  are all available.
There is a new playground being constructed and is, most likely, completed now.
In the tourist season there are a desert vendor, strawberrys and pav etc, plus, other beautiful delights and a Bao van, with Asian foods.
The reception area also has a store with most things you will need at short notice. There are plenty of tourist nick naks, some clothing, some fishing gear, etc.
A self check in, key and fob pickup at reception helps with a quick arrival process.
If you have paid via the app they will send you a message if your accommodation is ready and to pick up your paper work and keys from the box on the counter.
All the possible information you need will be I  an envelope and the text or email will have a link for other park and surrounds activities.
Staff are fantastic and very willing to help where needed.
The Park is huge and has something for everyone of every age and budget and type of accommodation.
Extra highly recommended.
Cheers, Q.
Great service from all staff, clean amenities blocks and reasonable prices for sites. Parked in a powered pet friendly tent site, the site was large enough for a camper trailer.
Great park, new pools with slide for kids. Good atmosphere. Would recommend.

We are Lilly and Skye travelling around Australia with mum and dad.
Busy park, well managed. Lilly and Skye loved the strawberries and cream caravan and the open air cinema where we could run free in the mornings. Zoom zoom zoom.
Plan to come back someday.

Flow us...next stop Tennant Creek Outback Caravan Park

We had a great stay here. A lovely park the facilities bright and in good order. Mostly clean. However a little attention to detail around the edges in the showers and toilets wouldn't go astray. One hand wash was empty the whole time we were there. And the road surfaces are in need of some attention.  In saying all that I've never seen so many staff on the ground in a park working and over all a great place to stay.

Very relaxing stopover
Family friendly park

Spent a few days in Discovery Parks - Alice Springs great park for Cabins, Camping and Campervans. We had a cabin for a few days and a space for our campervan for a few days.  Cabins are very nice, clean, comfortable and fully equipped which was perfect for us during our visit before collecting the campervan. The campervan spaces and facilities were exceptional, the site is very quite, very clean, showers hot, kitchen facilities excellent (all kept very clean, not full of dirt, mud and hairs, the grounds staff deserve applause for their dedication) there is a dump point on site too, and the pool is great for adults and kids alike. The staff in the office are to be commended for their great approach, politeness, patience and overall customer service.  Highly recommended if you need a great place to stay during your visit to Alice Springs.
Screw on our patch resulting in a flat tyre. No go!
We felt very safe, suited were good value and actors were lovely, and well kept.

A great stay . This park has everything . Clean facilities . Amazing camp|Kitchen . We don’t have children but there are plenty of activities and playgrounds and a fun looking water park about to open , nice pools . An Asian food truck and fantastic strawberry and pancake food truck|Walking distance to the brewery
Great park. Would book again
New mangers working hard to make good. Facilities dated but good. Grass sites with plenty of room.
Highly recommend. I needed to change my plans last minute and they went above any beyond to help. Facilities are good staff are excellent. Felt safe

We've been there several times the last month and used the park as base for our trips to Kings Canyon, Uluru, Gemtree, Arltunga and Coober Pedy. There are ensuite campsites with showers or bathtubs/showers, which is very convenient after a few days self-contained camping. There's plenty for kids to do: Friday is movie night, Saturday is kids' club, and Sunday is pancake breakfast. Sometimes at breakfast and dinner, a few parrots show up to say hello. Well equipped camp kitchen and BBQs. A new water park has been built next to the pool area and will be ready for use in early September. On our last arrival, we had bad luck with our campsite; I had a screw in my caravan's tire, so I assume it was left there. I recommend checking the gravel site for unwanted items before driving on it. I doubt the staff checks for this when setting up pitches for new arrivals.

We had a fantastic 2-night|stay at Alice Springs Discovery|Park!|A The park was spotlessly clean, with plenty of activities for families, including entertainment rooms, a beautiful pool, bike hire, and a sunset area The amenities,|laundry, and camp kitchens were all excellent! | The staff|went above and bevond|making us feel welcome and safe, even though the park is a bit out of town this was A big plus as the was a variety of food options, including a strawberry milkshake van , pancake van,|and bao bun van|And, of|course, the brewery across the road was a highlight, especially since we could take our furry|friend along we would Highly recommend discovery park Alice springs

We had a fantastic 2-night
stay at Alice Springs Discovery
Park!
A The park was spotlessly clean, with plenty of activities for families, including entertainment rooms, a beautiful pool, bike hire, and a sunset area The amenities,
laundry, and camp kitchens were all excellent!
The staff
went above and bevond
making us feel welcome and safe, even though the park is a bit out of town this was A big plus as the was a variety of food options, including a strawberry milkshake van , pancake van,
and bao bun van
And, of
course, the brewery across the road was a highlight, especially since we could take our furry
friend along we would Highly recommend discovery park Alice springs
Great place to stay staff helpful, amenities clean heated swimming pool wonderful, dog friendly

📌 Discovery Parks - Alice Springs

Recommended accommodation for an overnight stay, whether driving to Darwin or heading south.

Fortunately, the park was not crowded during our visit, contrary to reviews. As evident in the photos, there was ample empty space between campers.

The shower and toilet facilities were clean and well-maintained. The kitchen area was also available and clean. Additionally, laundry facilities and clothes drying areas were provided.

The park offers various accommodation options, including cabins, powered sites, and an unpowered area, which we opted for.

Families will appreciate the pool and playground facilities available for children.

We have stayed here before and we absolutely love it here.

Great location, close enough to everything but far enough away

The staff are always so helpful and friendly.

There's a dessert truck there (yum I highly recommend the strawberry pancakes and a strawberry thick shake) they also had a bayo bun place (if I remember correctly) however it wasn't open at the time of our stay.

This place is secure and and a great place to stay.

We'll definitely be back
Really neat and clean caravan park! The pools are beautiful, we love the waterslide!The long pool is really warm! My family stayed in swimming for ages!

We stayed here in both a standard bunk cabin with kitchenett and on uncovered sites.
Cabin was clean and tidy with well equipped kitchen and comfy beds.
Umpowered sites were in a good spot, had to unhook and wouldn't want to have anything bigger that a camper trailer as hill above made it a bit tight to reverse into but otherwise was a nice area away from others.
Amenities were clean and tidy in the female block, male amenities could use some maintaining as we had trouble getting hot water at all or maintaining hot water for the duration of the shower.
Pools were very nice and two food vans on-site were also an added bonus for late night dessert 🍨
Staff were very helpful accommodating us with adding additional nights to our stay and after hours check in was very easy.

A very well maintained resort, this park is immaculate in every way, the amenities,  the camp kitchens they have thought of everything. We've stayed in loads of parks and this one is by far the best. Very well managed. Loads to do in this park. Lots of activities going on and great staff. 5kms out of town and peaceful.

We recently stayed at the park, playground and pool are amazing.
The powered sites are on the smaller side if you have a large van
They have some lovely staff but unfortunately the couple that are managing the park are very unprofessional, rude and the male was quite aggressive
He would drive faster then the speed limit around the park  and almost hit one of our children
We were not the only people at the park that had issues with him and his wife behaviour

Such a shame- this park was "great" on the surface.
Unfortunately the staff more specifically the 60+year old couple that are work/staying there with their dog and their business plastered on their truck are horrible, rude, and not child friendly.
We were hardly in the park as we were out during the day and not staying up or outside late however....
Upon the day of departure we were told that the old woman was accessing personal information from the computer at the reception where she works (not during check-in), she was accessing this for her own personal reasons and interests. Breach of one's privacy and credit card details, home addresses and everything else you have to put down on a booking- I would be open to having a discussion with someone from head office of Discovery or the owners in regards to why they are allowing this old woman such power and  not to mention her allowing her dog to go poo beside other peoples caravans.
The ensuite site bathrooms NEED renovating, was not cleaned and had opened (unsealed) moisturiser and shampoo. The powered sites were cramped in and not suitable for lengthy caravans.
We could say more about the working couple who clearly did not like kids in the park or around them but we will leave it at that and hope the park itself can place boundaries for their staff members.
Shame that old bitter couples can crush experiences for others due to jealously & their thoughts of superiority and are given jobs to downgrade caravan parks that have great potential.
Great caravan park
Stayed in the caravan parks, very clean and maintained
Well kept Park

Well positioned CP for staying whilst visiting Alice with a dog. Sites were generous in size, amenities were clean and the brewery across the road was a bonus. Cost was fair as well considering were it is located
Beautiful place to stay very clean and very friendly staff thanks 😊
Very good caravan park. They have 4 swimming pools, a play ground 4 kids and jumping pillow and your own amenities if you want it.
While they say their park is "dog friendly" there is absolutely nowhere in the park to exercise your dog
他們的露營地方很安全，在check-in的時候他們給你一個入閘卡，他們會給你清晰的地圖，你們很容易找到自己的停車地方和所有設備，設備十分乾淨！如果需要洗衣機請預留硬幣，$5 一次，洗衣房外面有得晾衣！
Booking in was simple and the staff were very friendly. Clean tidy and easy accessibility
Perfectly situated within close proximity to all tourist spots...park is extremely well run with great facilities.
Good stay, unfortunately our car was broken into on the last night. So security not unfalable.

Lovely large park with lots of amenities to suit everyone. Drive through site was excellent for us. Felt safe. Close to town. If you want an exceptional meal in Alice : Hanuman (Thai/Indian) is stunning. ||Only feedback I would provide park is when you are charging for these of your washing machines (which can’t be a cheap commodity) it’s reasonable to expect a good wash. Maybe not excellent given level of use, but good. Not mediocre bordering  on substandard. It was evident the filters are not regularly cleaned. For future patrons paying for this service can I recommend this be done regularly : it will benefit longevity if your machines as well.

Great place to stay. Staff were very helpfull with local information and activities. The park has lots of kids' activities and extras, icecream ,pancakes and soon a new water park. Pool slide and one heated pool .Gated and secure.

This is a great park. It is very big so lots of people but they have plenty of camp,kitchens and toilet blocks so it copes very well. Lovely staff and the pool do,pled is great. One pool is heated but it gets very busy in the afternoons. My tip is go for a swim in the morning. Great games room and nice open fire at sunset hill for drinks and nibbles on Tuesday nights. Large sites and an easy bike ride to town and all the attractions. Great bike paths in Alice. Park is also secure and we felt very safe. Just be sensible with your belongings.

I stayed here for 8 months on both a permanent and long stay site. I have travelled back and forth to brisbane twice in that time - across the Barkley Hwy through NT and Central Queensland and South through SA, VIC and NSW. I hold my hands up and say Discovery Parks Alice Springs was THE BEST park I stayed at in the last 8 months and I only stayed at showgrounds and caravan sites with 4.5+ ratings.

I realise after this trip across Central Qld that I was absolutely SPOILED at Alice Discovery with the site size, amenities and community. Honestly, there is nothing to complain about after experiencing being packed in like sardines at EVERY SINGLE PLACE we stayed along this journey. I lived in Alice for 18 months prior to moving onto the caravan park and although I never felt overly concerned about crime, I can say that the lacklustre/nonexistent security of these other parks makes me realise how completely safe I felt in Alice Discovery Park. I never once worried about my personal safety and belongings. So glad to know I have this place to come back to and how lucky we are to have such luxuriously big sites in comparison!
Very friendly staff and people inside the park.  Kids could enjoy themselves and play whilst we relaxed
Great place to stop and enjoy the park as well as Alice springs and surrounding areas felt safe and secure with great management and staff
Back gate to the Alice Springs brewery, good service  music beer and food.
Well organised park. Clean and well maintained with great amenities and activities.Sunday morning pancakes for a gold coin was an unexpected delight. Thankyou guys.

We had an unpowered site up on the hill where we were literally packed in like sardines right on top of our neighbors with no room to maneuver in or out with our vehicle.  No hot water in the men’s amenities.  No apology or refund given.  What a horrible experience at this park.  Never to return!

For $100 a night, you'd expect at least helpful “host” but clearly not keen to help with small requests when booking . Unfortunately, disappointing experiences seem to be the norm when booking through this chain of parks — not just a one-off for us, (maybe because we are a large family not in a cabin??)
Love it. Great spot

Nice park, quiet area. Well explained layout of where site was when arrived. Nice family fell, felt safe. Only thing was queuing when arrived can work on simplifying the process which are doing with the pre paid envelopes. Certainly will be back again

Friendly welcoming staff at reception especially Linda & Dee
Thank you!
Secure gated park, good amenities!
They text a reminder nightly to secure all your personal items!
Adequate to purpose. Men's showers only had tepid water for some reason.

Wir hatten einen Stellplatz mit eigenem kleinen Badezimmer. Dieses war auch sauber. Wir kamen leider zu spät beim Campingplatz an, sodass die Rezeption bereits geschlossen hatte. Dies war aber nicht weiter problematisch und wir konnten telefonisch einchecken. Ansonsten war alles top.

I spoke to Linda upon booking and she went out of her way to find us a site. The staff are very friendly, also very organised with booking at reception- no waiting with check in as envelopes with map and security cards are ready upon arrival.
Kids loved the jumping pillow and water slide.
Feels very secure.
Great views

Our preferred caravan Park in Alice Springs. Nice big sites with good facilities. Consider your need for internet access, as the park system struggles when the park is full and the 4G/5G is ok for calls, but a bit marginal for hotspot connection.
Really well serviced camp ground, great facilities.
Great facilities, but you are packed in like sardines. Very friendly staff and I felt very safe. Huge fences with a key pass to enter a large electronic gate. Lots of kids even when it's school time!

I’d like to send a special thank you to Linda “in the background” for the booking at such short notice booking me in for how long it took which allowed me to stay in the caravan park for five days or longer if needed waiting for a replacement component for my car to be sent up from Melbourne.

Without this booking, would be at another caravan park which would not have been my first preference as this is the best caravan park in Alice Springs as l always stay here.

Thanks again, Linda for your compassion, which was much appreciated.

Kind regards,
Ashley

This is the first time in a long time we have stayed in Alice Springs because of all the troubles they are having. The Mc Donnell discovery caravan Park has built high fences around the park as well as card system to get in and out of the gates. I felt very safe there. The staff were lovely and tried to accommodate with what we wanted,( a driver through site and not have to unhitch, as we were only there 1 nght). We will not hesitate to stay there again next year.
Great people and service
Very friendly staff. Absolutely spotless amenities. Well maintained grounds n plenty to do if you have kids.
2nd time here Love this park

Great caravan park, good location. Safe.
Friendly, helpful staff.
Clean toilets and showers.
Stayed in a cabin, was what I expected yet still quite comfy, security and amenities were amazing. I would recommend and wife got a membership for further discounts

The staff at the park are wonderful and went out of their way to accommodate all my needs.

I booked a deluxe 2 bedroom cabin. I arrived late and initially thought my cabin looked great. However, upon pulling back the blankets, I noticed the bottom sheet appeared to have been slept in, and the quilt was stained—one stain resembled blood. I contacted the night staff, who responded promptly and, with many apologies, changed all the bedding. They also cleaned some marks off the wall. The fan in the bedroom was dusty and could use a good cleaning. Additionally, the patchwork job on the wall beneath the window was not very neat—I'd say I could have done a better job myself. The underside of the table was disgusting, dried food and who only knows what stuck to it. The shower recess had orange stains and some mould, and around tap handles on basin, which a thorough cleaning with appropriate products could easily address. The following day, after getting no sleep due to back pain caused by a medical condition I requested a firmer bed. The staff had no problem at all and quickly moved me into another unit that offered a selection of beds for me to choose from. This was greatly appreciated and made a big difference in my comfort.

The second unit was suitable for my back, as one of the beds had a firmer mattress. However, there were some cleaning issues here as well. The main bed quilt had stains, dust was visible on the picture frames, and the dining table's seat material could benefit from a steam clean. The air conditioner remote didn’t work despite new batteries, so I had to operate it manually, and it was set to a high heat setting—comfortable at night, but less so during the day. Also, the cold water wasn’t running in the bathroom basin.

In both units, I found bugs in the light fixtures and dusty bathroom fans. The walls and doors had scuff marks that could easily be cleaned. Overall, both units could benefit from a thorough spring clean.

On a positive note, the park is securely fenced, and I felt safe throughout my stay. The units are well equipped and the park facilities are excellent for families and kids, and the pancake kiosk is a fantastic addition with delicious food. The reception staff were friendly, professional, and attentive.
Thank you so much - we really enjoyed our stay here, felt very safe & secure. Staff were wonderful to deal with & the facilities were top notch & very reasonably priced! Would highly recommend
Great park. Large level grassed sites. Modern camp kitchen. Spotless amenities. Would definitely recommend.

Good park out of town so there’s no issues, speed needs to be enforced throughout park, camp kitchen is very well presented, only thing I didn’t appreciate a phone call when I was out sight seeing advising me I should of left and I was on the wrong deal when I had one day to go, really set of my anxiety..
Booked in advance, check-in package waiting on arrival, straight in no fuss... wanted to extend stay, again no fuss..
旅行中，因為車輛維修，多停留了一週，感謝你們的幫助🙏
Powered caravan site. Good size, easy access. Booking staff (Linda) was great to deal with. I dont book on line, prefer to speak to a real person. Staff at camp really friendly and helpful.

we feel so safe at this caravan park!
everything was perfect, it was quiet, nice amenities and kitchen
very nice staff
we highly recommend !

Office staff above and beyond fixing the room issues when pointed out which was a bit disappointing to see on arrival after a long drive.
Swimming pool enjoyed by all great location nice to see a well kept park.
Excellent staff x2 linda on reception so helpful.  Great grounds clean amenities, looking forward to coming back on our figure 8 trip.

Fantastic caravan park.
One of the best we have ever stayed in.

We recently stayed at Discovery Parks – Alice Springs for the weekend, and it was an incredible experience! Having visited several BIG4 and Discovery Parks before, I can confidently say this one meets the same high standard.

The park is huge, with plenty of activities and entertainment for kids, making it a fantastic family-friendly destination. The facilities were spotless, and our cabin was perfectly located—just a short walk from the pool, which was a huge bonus!

The staff were exceptional—friendly, welcoming, and always helpful. We were lucky enough to be there for the Sunday free pancake breakfast, which was such a nice touch and made the weekend even more enjoyable.

Our cabin was spacious, clean, and comfortable, with absolutely no issues. We had an amazing stay and will definitely be recommending this park to everyone. Can’t wait to visit again!
We stayed here on several occasions in May last year with our camper trailer. Very safe and extremely well maintained - can't really find a fault at all! Makes for an excellent base camp

Our family of 5 had a great 2 week stay here with over Christmas, the staff were wonderful and we woke on Christmas morning to a little gift pack for kids which was very thoughtful. On NYE they also gave some fun things like glow sticks and bubble wands with fun activities for kids on New Year’s Day. We enjoyed the pool and slide. Amenities were very clean and lots of reminders about keeping our camp and vehicles locked up but we didn’t have any trouble while there. Overall great experience and we will be back!

Staff were amazing and so accommodating as I accidentally did a last minute booking for a cabin on the day of stay and when we arrived after hours I realised I had booked for the next day. I called the after hours number and the staff organised another cabin that was available and have us the key. Thank you so much!!!
Family friendly and safe accommodation with nice pool and water slide for the kids.
Stayed 3 nights in a cabin  brilliant cabin  amazing  staff. All the amenities are perfect.

Situated just out of town through the gap.||Very clean and quiet park.||Lots of activities for all ages.||Friendly helpful reception.||Fully fenced and gated park.||We had 2 powered sites with ensuites.||On one night and astronomer came along with his telescope and gave us a lecture on the night sky. Very interesting.||We felt very safe here at night, Alice Springs has recently had trouble with the youth. The night curfew had just been lifted before we arrived. In all we had zero trouble and we were in Alice for 3 days.

What a great park. Extremely safe, staff are incredibly helpful, welcoming and friendly, enough space on one unpowered site for 2 coaster buses, hardly anyone in the park because there’s so much room, the pool was really nice ( the slide is a bonus ), not the mention the weekly activities that are held within the park such as movie nights, cook ups and dancing, having an air conditioned gym and reading room at a caravan park is unreal.
Ended up coming back and staying again because it was so nice.
Thankyou guys

Very friendly staff. Great location. All amenities spotless! Great pool area. I would have given a 5 star rating, only for the fact the caravans were too tightly crammed together in one specific area, especially when it was very obvious to see the park was no where close to being full, there was an abundance of other spots available.
Great park, just out of town. Express check-in was quick and easy. Row names or numbers would be good, so it would be easier for an old bloke to find my way around.
One of the best park's in Alice Springs our second time here we love it 😀
Kids loved the waterside.
Had an ensuite motorhome site.  This place is best campsite we hav have had on trip (3 weeks).  Terrific pools and the most wonderful staff imaginable.   Highly recommend.  Stayed 3 days.

We were camping, no kids, 2 dogs. Upon check-in I informed the reception staff the size van we had. Despite  me asking about a drive through site,and the place being less than 1/4 full we were put across from the jumping pillow. Upon arriving at the site, a large pole at the rear of the site meant we couldn't make use of the entire site without our drawbar overhanging on the road. We moved the van over, but this resulted in the rear of the van encroaching on the site behind. Upon reviewing the other vans around us, the all appeared to be 16-18 foot vans. Ours is 22. The next day another 22ft van tried for 15 minutes to get in beside us and didn't fit either. These people were moved to a larger site.
I had gone to reception to inform them of the problem, but they weren't interested.
Will we be back, probably Not!
This park is fantastic! Safe and secure, great facilities and caters well for the kids. We liked it so much we came back again and stayed a week.
Very helpful staff (Linda) when trying to find accommodation for another NT venue when we couldn't get through. Thanks Linda!

I camped here in a tent for 2 nights. Very spacious sites and close to the amenities block which was very clean. Camp kitchen was excellent and the brewery over the road served great food. Felt very safe and secure. Will be back👍🏻
Stayed as a family of 5 in the caravan park.  Kids enjoyed the pool.  Bathoom / showers were reasonably clean.  Pub 2 min walk down the road ok to break things up and have a meal out.

Great park! Loved the 2 pillows for separate ages. Staff super friendly and heaps for the kids to do

If you can, try to avoid being here when there aren’t bus loads of teenagers. Was the only downfall of our stay. Loud, obnoxious and disgusting in the communal bathrooms
Huge park clean amenities plenty of space nice pool and no trouble 👌

What a great park. Super clean and tidy|A great place for couples and families|Truly an oasis|Were secure and friendly staff. |The camp kitchen is one of the best I have seen.|Activities for kids are great. One of the biggest Bounce facilities I have ever seen|Competitive pricing.
Comfortable bed and clean cabin ,very slow wifi and only worked outside . Bedroom TV didn't work .
Booked a powered site, great service, reasonable price, pool fantastic, grounds need maintenance
Great! Nearby a lot of places like McDonald’s and Cole’s and other places
We are camping and it is fabulous. Highly recommend.
Wonderful place to visit.

Amazing, quiet, secure, clean park with many excellent facilities. Friendly helpful staff at check in, pancakes on Sundays for those weary travellers who have run out of food and a choice of 4 pools and slides for kids. Superb- this is undoubtedly the best site we’ve found so far. |And it’s next door to a brewery. 👌

Stayed here for 3 nights while in town for the beanie festival in one of the standard 2 bedroom cabins and it was just the right size for us as a couple with a fully packed car. Happy with the cleanliness of the space for the price when you factor in all the other facilities on site too. This caravan park had the most tidy and easy to use laundry room out of all the parks we visited in. There were friendly staff and a well stocked general store, used to pool in the non-busy hours - beautifully warm water even in the middle of winter, very happy that the pool wasn't closed in winter either.|Security was great, fully fenced all around with fob for both car and pedestrian entry/exit. While you are a short drive from town, you can still walk across the road to the Brewery for dinner. |Would definitely come back and stay here with kids with the amount they have available to keep them entertained.

Mooi park net buiten Alice Springs met meerdere zwembaden. Veel leuke extra activiteiten met als hoogtepunt sterren kijken met bijbehorende uitleg. We hadden een powered ensuite. De ensuite was erg gehorig en wat verouderd maar voor de rest prima. Veel wasmachines en waslijnen. En s’nachts erg stil. Dit park is ook een pickup plek voor veel tours wat voor ons erg handig was.

This park was safe and secure.
Could hear the cars hooning around town but didn't bother us in the park.
Huge park. Offers everything you need in a park

The park is great, and the staff were all fantastic.
Was great to have food facilities inside the park, and the Brewery being within walking distance is a massive bonus.

This didn't impact my review, but caravan parks really need to consider having smoking zones or smoking/non-smoking sites.
We were camped for several days beside very heavy smokers, which made it impossible to sit outside our van, or open the windows.

Staff are really nice. 10 min drive max to town. Feels safe in caravan park. Wonderful for kids if you have them as lots to do. Big  caravan site. Ensuites are dated but nice to have. Hot water is great. Can be very noisy in the park with kids depending on who you are next to.|Site are ok would be nice to have a bit more space between vans.
Lovely safe place to stay

Amazing caravan park for everyone. Clean facilities, plenty of washing machines and clothes lines, well equipped gym and loads of fun for the kids. Jumping pillow, waterslide and planned activities. Today we participated in the kids olympics! Thanks for a great stay.

I stayed on an unpowered site - had booked 1 night ended up staying a week waiting for a part for my car. What a nuce place to stop! I usually stay at free rest areas, this was a lovely break. Clean amenities, spacious well equiped kitchen, friendly staff, beautiful surroundings and a sunset hill, and even a reading room if you want some quiet. You get a discount after 4 nights which makes it really affordable if you stay a little longer.

The perfect place to come back to after visiting the busy Alice Springs, and the perfect place to stop before/after more outback adventures. I felt at home.
(NB i'm a woman solo traveler in my early 30s)
It's a very neat and tidy caravan park, 🐕  friendly , has lots of things for kids, and feels safe to stay and great receptionists

I'm quite happy about staying here at Discovery Park, Alice Springs. We are only camping here, but there are lots of things to keep the children entertained. We have our own toilet and shower block,  which is a little bit of luxury for us. There are a couple of food vans here, too. A night off cooking if you like. The amenities are nice and clean, and the staff are nice and friendly.

Awesome caravan park with clean and plentiful facilities, 2 food vans open every night, and frequent events for campers. The staff here are incredible and the prices are great!

I want to express a massive "thank you" to Suzie and Dee who both went out of their way multiple times to help us when we got stuck here for an extended amount of time when our van had to go in for emergency mechanics. Both Suzie and Dee helped sort us out with accommodation to fit our needs and helped offer us flexibility around our stay without which our lives would have been significantly harder. Honestly can't thank you enough!

Strongly recommend this park!!
Reception very helpful.  Park of top quality.   Great camp kitchens and well maintained facilities.

Excellent facilities, excellent park. Modern, clean, well-maintained. Lots of amenities (pools, gym, playgrounds, jumping pillows, entertainment rooms), plus a couple of food vans each night. Plenty of laundry facilities. A little out of the centre of town, but that suits us just fine. Would stay again.

Amazing the park has everything you need. The staff were lovely and so accomodating give we broke down and needed to stay longer.
Really understanding. A++++

Very nice tidy and clean van
park
Loved this park. .So clean ,hugh sites and the staff were so helpful and friendly.
Great park for families. Plenty of amenities and take away food vans. But please don't advertise you have free WiFi. The service is non existent.
Good value for money. Everything you need.
Awesome facilities, clean , friendly staff
Very nice park, lots of activities. Huge park, and awesome security fence. The best security conscious Discovery Park we have stayed in. Well done team!!

Rang 5 mins before arriving, wanted a drive through site and was told no problem, they will find something. Small friendly park. Getting old but the vibe was relaxed and safe. Nothing was too much trouble for Host Lindsay.

A nice park located South of town, at the start of the Ross Highway. Quiet. Secure. Clean, modern facilities. Laundry. Pool. Kids activity centre. Well stocked kiosk. Camp kitchen. Dump point. Level spots for caravans of all sizes (but you may need to practice your reversing skills). Two food vans sell Chinese food and desserts (pancakes, ice-cream) after-hours.
Has good kitchen. Rooms are small. wifi and Vodafone doesn’t work which annoyed me.
Great place to stay. Very good amenities. Stayed here multiple times in last 15 years, both camping and cabins. Highly recommended.
Good safe park
What an awsome caravan park. Really good size parking bays, neat, clean and tidy. The camp kitchens are next level. Staff were warm and friendly. Felt really safe here.
Cabins perfect for our needs.
I've stayed in quite a few of these parks now and to date this is the best yet. it had so much going on for kids, pets, humans, food trucks, dessert trucks, pools etc..

We had amazing service from Vicki. We had car trouble and a change of plans (getting to Alice Springs one day early). She managed to help us book an ensuite site when we were driving to Alice Springs in a car with alternator trouble. As we got our car fixed, she ensured we could stay for longer at a wonderful cabin (all the ensuite campsites were full). The facilities at the cabin were outstanding and the staff were very friendly. The caravan park has good facilities and the fried chicken there was outstanding. Absolutely lovely 3 night stay there!

Stayed 3 individual nights on powered site & all very comfortable secure stays. Park is large & busy & located south of the City & about 1km from highway - 2 other parks in vicinity,  along with a service station & local brewery.

The park has a large office with a small shop. The park organises an activity most evenings - linedancing, free nibbles at sunrise. As well there are food trucks on site - deserts every night & savoury some nights.

Good children facilities - playground, water slides, heated pools & jumpy castle. Numerous cooking areas/bbq's & great dish washing set up - scourer, brushes & detergent.

Various amenity blocks around park. Park also has numerous accommodation units. There is an elevated area for sunsets - also has a screen for movie night.

Front is secured by large steel gates accessed by card.

Rapport qualité prix imbattable ! Nous avons voyagé tout autour de l’Australie avec mon conjoint et c’est la première fois que l’on trouve un caravan park aussi propre, calme et bien équipé pour si peu cher (25$/nuit pour un site sans branchement électrique). En plus, ils proposent des activités tous les jours : sunset, danse etc. Bref je recommande !
Excellent park. The facilities were well kept and clean. The food trucks at night made a great difference.
Very good caravan park, clean amenities and camp kitchen

Very close to the city but very safe and peaceful
The staff was great and the park has everything you need

Lovely park with great facilities but we had a motorcycle workshop behind us (Finke race on). They were noisy day n night and I did contact the manager late at night. Washing bikes and our clothes n car with gerni's, it was a catch up area for everyone. 1 person decided to go to the bathroom beside the trailer during the day in clear view. I would suggest to put all the race goers together as it is such a big park.
Best price/quality ratio in whole Australia so far. Excellent campground
Great location. Multiple swimming pools. Lots of activities you can enjoy. Skipsey puts on a great show on Thursday nights.

Great park close to town
Very secure
Lovely hot powerful showers
Park entertainment good and varied and free 👍

Great place, really secure. Great pool, arcade, go carts, jump balloon and more. A really great place for a holiday. I came on the weekend of the fink races so there weren’t many rooms available but it was all in all a great experience.

Spent almost 6 weeks here at the park whilst I was working in town.
Found the staff to be knowledgeable, friendly and always up for a chat.
The only issue we had was with international backpackers who wish to disobey park rules and cook meals and be noisy in camp kitchens after midnight, and continue to be rude and noisy when asked nicely to keep it down. In saying this management did sort the issue out the very next morning.

The park has an awesome pool area, jumping pillows X 2 and 2 kids parks.

The town itself is very safe even venturing out at night.

Amazing place to stay in Alice. Lovely clean rooms as goes with the brand name. Great amenities and service is good. Shared bbq was the best touch

The location is amazing being just outside town and next to a petrol station. The pools are also fantastic and they organise few tours also

This is the best caravan park I have been to.  Although we dont have children with us, I can see that children would love it.  With lots of activities for them, they would not have to leave the park for entertainment.  The amenities blocks are spotless and well maintained.  Plenty of washing machines and dryers.  Camp kitchens are once again spotless and the staff are very friendly.  Gold coin donation for pancakes on Sundays are delicious.  Other activities are held on various days of the weeks with an SMS sent to you to advise of time and venue in the park.  We unfortunately had to stay in Alice due to car problems but I couldn’t think of a better park to be stuck in.  Well done Alice Springs Discovery Parks!!!!

Amenities are large and clean. Plenty of washing machines and dryers along with clothes line space. 3 swimming pools. Stuff for the kids.
Sites can be a little bit ordinary and uneven.
Great caravan park

We’ve stayed in this park a few times over the years and it never disappoints. Ammenities are very clean and well maintained.. Park is across the road from Alice Springs Brewing Co and when it’s operating the Pancake Van is a great hit. Great facilities for kids with a huge jumping mat and great swimming pools Always feel safe in the park with gated access. I feel for Alice Springs with the amount of negative publicity and have never had an issue.

Great kids park - pools, waterside & go parts.   Very roomy sites.  Lots of amenities kept very clean.  Felt very safe.  Only short drive to town.  Beautiful setting with a sunset viewing area.  Highly recommend 😊
We loved it here. The staff are lovely and the managers come from my home town in NSW and they are the best park managers.

Stayed here 2 weeks ago. No problems. Felt safe in cvn pk & even township was o.k. stayed 6 nights.
Cvn pk facilities o.k with slabs,power & water all good.  Pool area & camp kitchen looked great,...but i never used them..
Lots to see around the town & outer Ranges were terrific. Highly recommend.

Very disappointed with the service I received, I've stayed in many caravan parks and this was by far the worst service I have ever received. When checking in, firstly they couldn't find my booking and then eventually when sorted they handed an envelope to me and then walked off to talk to her friends. I asked her how I get through the gate and her only reply quite abruptly was "it's all in the envelope". The caravan park itself was nice and the amenities were clean but I'm a people person and when I get rude service it puts me off. Would never stay there again.

Great cabin. Kids absolutely loved the pool, slide and jumping pillow.
Ladies in reception always lovely, plenty of items in their shop to top you up from food to washing powder.
Good amenities.
Absolutely worth every dollar

We really loved this park. Not sure about staying in Alice given the recent bad publicity, but we felt very secure here. Park clean with good amenities and staff friendly and helpful. Capped off by great show on Sunset Hill last night with Errol Gray singing his country songs and nature putting on a spectacular display with the sunset. Highly recommend staying here if you’re passing through.

Well appointed cabin with its own undercover parking and sensor lighting. Locked gates and fobbed entry for added security. Comfortable bed. Great aircon, nice large bathroom and hot shower. Activities in the park for adults and kids. Nice pool. Quiet. Great laundry facilities. Staff very helpful. WiFi not great.

Only go if you appear rich. No wo der why alice springs has the racial issues they do. As hightoer level G'day parks, single woman travelling with a dog SA to NT. whyalla Park helped me. The membership sounded great. And assured while relocating I would not be discriminated against as I don't have a van, caravan etc no dogs on unpowered sites at all. It's a dog friendly day park. No option but to pay for items I don't need. I get parks are upset councils are taking their business. But this was wrong. I sleeping around the streets in Alice something happens to me, my car and belonging  I'm coming for revenge

Fantastic park, it has great sites quite spacious and grassed. Amenities are big and very clean great showers. The camp kitchens are amazing i have never seen anything like it. And for kids I don't think you could ask for a better park with two or three big jumping pillows a cool play ground and a big pool area with four pools. And the staff are very helpful and friendly.

Booked & PAYED 10 months ago for 2 nights @ $148. Only to show up & be told my account was owing $2. They said reason being as prices have gone up. A bit ridiculous ..Great park though but I’m sure they could of not fussed over $2.. embarrassing on their behalf.

This discovery park is sooo neat!!!
Beautiful landscaping, big and spacious driveways and paths, a very, very well maintained and clean caravan park.
Bedsheets are very clean, the cabin is spacious and it has everything that we need.
The facilities are great, plenty of things to do within the property.
The only thing is that the pool doesn't open until 8am! It would be nice if they open it from 6am for early risers.
Prices are very reasonable. This is definitely the place to stay in Alice, but it's not within walking distance from town.
Pet freindly

Mimo późnej godziny bardzo pomocna i miła obsługa. Rano też byliśmy mile zaskoczeni w pomocy uzyskania taksówki. Dziękujemy.
Czysty i schludny objekt dla rodzin z dziećmi

Honestly this park is amazing, Alice Springs can be daunting. This park makes you and your whole family safe. They have lots of activities for children and the amenities are great. We arrived very late and had not booked because of no phone reception from Mount isa to Alice Springs and where a bit worried to where we could stay that would be safe with a 2 year old and we called the emergency after hours phone number and they let us come and stay and fix them up in the morning. So grateful. Really beautiful staff also.

This is the perfect place to stay when visiting Alice Springs. It's quiet, safe, clean, beautiful and very entertaining. There are lots of things to do, many games to play, the swimming pool and the staff is very friendly too!
It felt very safe! 👍

Lovely caravan park at reasonable prices, really friendly staff that are always happy to help where needed. The amenities are also sparkling clean, awesome pool area with 4 pools to chose from 1 even with a slide. Always activities for all ages. We loved also the fact that it is gated and with cameras for the extra protection.

Great spot to stay.
Pool, good wifi, brewery with food across the road. Servo next door.
Anything outdoors with a view was great, hot but great. People are nice in Australia everywhere we went, can't complain.
A caravan park with everything!!

Discovery Park in Alice Springs looked after us when we couldn’t get through the Stewart Hwy due to floods.
My partner and I were grateful for the accommodating service, cabin, and location for our dog. We will be staying here again!!!
We camped using powered site. The facilities were great. Lots for  the kids to do the waterslide was a big hit.The sunset Hill was amazing.

The best campsite I've been to on my trip so far. So much amenities and equipment ! Large pool, gym, library, games room and lots of planned activities. I loved the pancakes on Sunday morning. A real treat !

Fantastic!
Large park, so many amenities like playground, jumping pillow, gym etc.
The pool was epic and the slide was so fun!
Staff was so lovely and accommodating for our group and went out of her way. Well stocked shop, very knowledgeable about places to go and eat!
Felt very safe with the very high fences and locking gates.

The best place to be. Love the space and view. Kids playground and activities for them to do. The cabin was nice and clean amd no smell of dog urine or poos . Kept everything clean. The bed comfy only thing strange second bedroom with bunks don't have power board and  fan. Hope in winter we can grab the fan. The air condition in sitting room is next to the kids room. It did kept room little cool.

The staff and visitors both were nice and friendly and I appreciate the team for letting us and 2 months puppy to stay at your place. Newnie (puppy name) had a long trip to mudgee and coming to a nice accomidation made the settlement process easy. My son was more engaged just him around while he joined the activity.
Good luck and we would be now searching for discovery stay.

People with allergies this place is the best. You have the attack even staying in the apartment. They also provide cleaning stuff so nice we can clean as we make mess.  I have allegories and I can't stand carpet and smelly drain or mouldy drain. None of these present in this hotel.

Kids animal allergy and disability  friendly

The swimming pool was fun and for my dev first time to be in the pool swimming. He was bit scared but when he saw puppy was fine touching the water. He went in the deep side.  Dog therapy is so nice to teach kids to be independent. The newnie slept for 44 mins while my son was having a swim. The place is pollution free with natural pure air flowing everywhere

Have fun guys and keep the place as it is including the future visitor. As a team the place will be kept awesome
大且安全，環境很好
Nice room and very friendly staff

Man fühlt sich hier sehr sicher durch einen guten Zaun! Die Mitarbeiter sind sehr freundlich und man merkt, dass der Campingplatz alles dafür tut, dass es den Gästen trotz der schwierigen Lage in Alice Springs gut geht! Wir waren insgesamt 5 Nächte hier und würden jederzeit wiederkommen! Absolute Empfehlung in Alice Springs!

Hooligans playing music very loud, drunken behaviour, offensive language.. well into the night. On-site staff/security didn’t do anything. Didn’t seem to care.. other places we have stayed have patrols to keep the peace and other campers tend to respect one another.
Great park in a quieter area of Alice. Feels very safe, fully gated. Fantastic for families.
One of the best parks we've visited. Lots of in park activities. Fitted our 12.5m bus
Large park.  Delightful staff.  Very well appointed ammenities  great security- fenced and key'd entry/exit.

What an awesome park we stayed in our van for 2 nights the staff were friendly and accommodating they had a slide in 1 of the 4 pools the kids loved it ( big kid aswell )there’s a small kiddie pool my 3 year old loves cause he could play independently. The amenities were clean and maintained as was the laundry room would highly recommend.

Stayed in a powered campsite! Was great. Exceptional facilities and they had events on every day.
Sunset hill is beautiful as well.
Highly recommend!

Nothing bad to say. They've really upgraded their security measures so the park does feel really safe. You still get a text each evening to remind you to lock up your things, but it is what it is.

Sites are a good size, and nice and grassy and the water and power are well maintained and easy to reach.

Amenities block is fresh, bright and airy and really nice. The pool is bloody awesome. Best to go during the day when all the families are out and about exploring.

Love that the caravan park puts on different events each night. Great

I stayed here for 5 days, and my overall experience was very good. they have a pool with a slide, a kart hire, an activity room, a movie room, a gym, a games room, and a jumping pillow. The rooms are clean and there is hot water, there are also pancakes on sunday morning

Won't be staying there anymore, they have pretty much doubles the price of rooms, quite sad as have been staying there many years for the red centre Nats event every year.  Rooms have also become very basic now.

It is a fantastic park, perfect for the family with all the activities and great pools. We enjoyed the astronomers' talk and saw the stars and saturn thru the telescope. Great facilities. Plus the pancakes with strawberries.
Great holiday park with plenty of good clean facilities. A credit to those owning and running the park.
Park has modernised its facilities, kids will love the jumping pillow and pool. Sites can be a bit tight and our site was all dust/dirt. Still give it 5* as it's upgrade is work in progress.

Great park. Level sites. Lots of clean amenities,  camp kitchens are also clean and spacious. Also heaps for the kids to do. The games room was great for our older kids. Movie nights on Fridays. Also felt very safe here.

We stayed here when we couldn't make it out to King's Canyon. Maggie was so helpful and helped us transfer some of our booking, she is an absolute credit to your park. The park itself is lovely and clean, will definitely stay again!
Great clean park.  Lots of trees.  Facilities are great lots of them and very clean.  Love the reading room.

The park has everything you needed or wanted and more. Facilities and amenities were awesome, 10/10 for everything. We had a powered ensure site and the ensuite was clean, shower hot with great pressure. Would recommend this place to everyone!
One of the best, we have been to. Will definitely be back.

My partner and kids drove 2500k to experience the red centre.  We chose to stay at discovery parks alice springs, what an amazing experience. We stayed in a deluxe cabin the time we were there and had no complaints at all, clean, modern facilities and the pool and play equipment for the kids was amazing 😉  the staff especially at the front counter we next level,  we have never felt so welcome 🙏  we met Eddy at reception and have never been greeted by such a lovely and helpful young lady. We will be back discovery! Thank you!!😊

We've been G'Day Park members for a few years now, and often choose to stay in one of their parks.

The Alice Springs Discovery Park is a stand out. It is a large well-designed park that caters for a variety of needs: cabins, caravans, camping trailers, tents, buses, etc.

The pool area provides several small popular pools: lap pool, general pool, spa pool and slide pool.

The office is spacious and has a small shop in the back.

Security is boosted with good fencing and electronic entry gates.

There are multiple BBQ facilities and amenities blocks, all kept very clean by hard-working staff.

Loved this place. My kid loved it too. In fact a barely saw her, loads of kids, activities, food vans, great pool and jumping pillow. Free marshmallows by the fire. Good ammenities, friendly staff, I wish we had stayed longer
Great park with all the facilities and more.
Super safe, very friendly staff and great all round park. Well priced as well

The standards here are tops. Everything is clean and well maintained. Lots of facilities all over this park. We stayed on a tent site over night, and then another night in one of the cabins. The cabin is one of the best I've ever stayed in; clean, well equipped, spacious, and most importantly it's quiet. Alice Springs Brewery is easy walking distance, with good meals.
Great place to stay, safe and secure.

This was the best value discovery park powered site In NT with the best facilities too. Good location. Just on the outskirts of town. We felt safe. Kids loved the slide and I loved the heated pool. Camp kitchens were immaculate. Showers needed a good scrub though and hot water In the shower was a bit hit and miss. Otherwise highly recommend

A fantastic park and very suitable with kids. Daily activities put on by the park are excellent.
The staff in reception helped cater for our needs whilst we had some car troubles and needed to extend our stay at short notice

We absolutely loved our 5 nights here! Huge powered site, reasonable price, daily activities, clean amenities, great SMS communication throughout our stay. I would 100% stay here again - well done to the staff

We stayed in the caravan area.  The sites were just adequate and vans were packed in. The facilities were impeccable  with a great camp kitchen,  pool ,jumping castle and more to amuse whole family's.
Awesome facilities and exceptional cleanliness.  Amazing staff, friendly, helpful, always smiling.  Thank you Kerry and John. Could not recommend more highly.  11 out of 10 🌞
Clean, well maintained, great facilities and excellent amenities  for disabled people

This is our 3rd stay on a powered site. Fantastic park with excellent facilities. We let them know in advance that we had purchased a bigger van..they said no worries. Our site is large and grassy with a slab. Facilities clean and cared for. Excellence camp kitchen. We will always stay here.
Fantastic caravan park park, no bad comments available 👍 thanks Alice Springs discovery park

What a beautiful & safe park!! Hubby wanted to over look Alice Springs due to obvious reasons in the media but I wanted facilities being we had none on board & we always travel with our Jack Russell terrier dog. From a friendly check in to a great unpowered site with a purpose built annexe mat and water tap on site we felt spoiled. Your amenities were spotless and a talking point of numerous fellow campers. We couldn’t believe how big the park was, the activities you had on and how secure we felt with your perimeter fencing. An absolute bonus you are pet friendly. We just couldn’t believe our luck and will be telling everyone else that makes the migration to the top to stop avoiding Alice Springs & make this park a must stop. See you upon our return & thank you!!
So fun for the kids. Great size sites, would have loved to have stayed longer. Would definitely book there again.
Boom boom, top caravan park. Excellent facilities and well maintained

This park is amazing. Stayed on our way up north from SA. Stayed at an ensuite site on sale for the same price as a powered site. Lovely pools, lovely clean facilities, nice lawned areas for tents, felt safe, out of town a bit so no issues at all. Do not hesitate to stay here if you’re travelling through Alice. Even Alice Springs was fine when we did shopping, local aborigines were actually quite friendly that we saw. And good wifi which you don’t get anywhere we've since found out!! Thankyou

Wow! This park is awesome!
Incredible facilities  for families and traveler’s.
Great pools, one hot, warm, and a cool pool plus a toddler paddle pool. Great water slide for all ages. They have multiple camp kitchens throughout the park with toasters, kettles and fridge/freezers, a games room and jumping pillow. Plenty of room on the camping sites. It’s fully fenced and the owners regularly upkeep the park. We seen a few locals jump the fence and the park security were straight onto it, and fixed the part where they jumped over. The reception has some great souvenirs and some basic essentials. It’s also a very short walk to Alice springs Brewery! And taxis will pick you up from here, very convenient. Anytime we come to Alice springs this is exactly where we will stay again!
Lovely park

The Caravan Ensuite site is a very nice site, the only negative is that the water and power location at the ensuite site are a long way away from where the caravan conections are. If we were in America, then the location would be ideal, but here in Australia, the caravan doors are on the left side, and the power/water are on the right side.
Loved it.

Great facilities.
Spacious sites.
Friendly staff.
Spacious sites.
Stayed for the second time and js the typical cookie cutter discovery park model. Kids loved the water slide. Stayed on powered site with 19 ft van.

Great place to stay. Loved our large site and the facilities were beautiful and plenty of activities. Also safe and secure.
Follow us Sweet-Az RV'n on youtube
Clean, friendly staff, awesome discovery Park

Pour le prix modeste, les commodités sont plus que respectables. Nombreux barbecues et éviers donc pas de queue. Grandes douches et toilettes ! Les autres campeurs étaient super sympathiques ! Je recommande.
Excellent Park to stay, felt very safe😃👍

Caravan stay Easy and quick book in. Staff at counter pleasant and helpful. Security fences and gates. ( key pad to enter and leave) Noted security patrols during night. Stated free WiFi but really hit and miss. Plenty events organised by park. Stargazing free movie night sing along dancing et. Sites big some with concrete slabs some ensuites. Sites fairly big and leve sites easy access to toilets and camp kitchens Plenty kids playgrounds Good amenities in camp kitchens Free BBQs. Chinese takeaway and strawberry and cream takeaway for your convenience Petrol ( more expensive than outside) air pressure machine. Swimming pool ( heated and I heated) good pressure showers and plenty hot water Only downside my opinion toilets ( men’s block 2) need a bit more care in cleaning. Dirt and foot prints hadn’t been cleaned in four days we were there. Location about 3 kilometres from town centre.
